description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a striking colorway of light blue, white, and black. The upper is primarily constructed from smooth leather panels, with light blue dominating the toe box, heel, and collar, while white covers the midfoot and toe vamp. Black accents are present on the Nike Swoosh, laces, collar lining, and the iconic Air Jordan Wings logo on the lateral side. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and the outsole is made of durable rubber with a visible tread pattern. The overall design is sporty and stylish, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A high-top sneaker in light blue, white, and black leather with a Nike Swoosh and Air Jordan Wings logo, featuring a padded collar and rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh, Air Jordan Wings logo, and the color-blocked leather panels in blue, white, and black.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel tab, padded collar, and the color transition from blue to white at the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the Swoosh partially visible and the toe box and lacing system in profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the perforated toe box, standard criss-cross lacing, and the Nike Air logo on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Air Jordan Wings logo on the lateral collar in black; Nike Swoosh on the side in black; Nike Air logo on the tongue in blue and black
